Part.Source: Event Start &PedidosSelecionados = 'SEL_WWPEDIDOVENDAAGR' RetornaAutorizacao.Call('WWPEDIDOVENDAAGR', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &FilCod.Clear() &Count = 0 tbFilialLancamento.Visible = 0 if &Context.FilialLancamento.Count > 1 tbFilialLancamento.Visible = 1 &PedFatFilCod = 0 for &FilialLancamento in &Context.FilialLancamento &FilCod.AddItem(&FilialLancamento.PesFilAce, substr(&FilialLancamento.PesFilRaz,1,20) ) &Count += 1 EndFor Else &FilCod.AddItem(&Context.FilCod, substr(&Context.FilRaz,1,20) ) Endif do 'montaFilialFaturamento' &DeOndeVem = 'PEDIDOVENDAAGR' &FiltroKey = 'FLT#WWPedidoVendaColumnsSelector' &UmZero = LoadColumnsSelectorState.Udp(&FiltroKey) Do CAse Case &UmZero = '2' &SalvarFiltro = false Case &UmZero = '1' &SalvarFiltro = true Otherwise RetornaConfUsuario.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.PesCod, domConfUsuario.Uconf001_PadraoFiltro, &UmZero) if &UmZero = '2' &SalvarFiltro = false Else &SalvarFiltro = true EndiF EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ tbFilialFaturamento.Width = 90 tbFilialLancamento.Width = 90 &EmpCod.Visible = False &AuxPedCod.Visible = False &DeOndeVem.Visible = False Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName DDO_GridColumnsSelector.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTCOD' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTCOD' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTCOD' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) &acoesEmGrupoData = new() &acoesEmGrupoDataItem = new() &acoesEmGrupoDataItem.Title = 'Totalizar' &acoesEmGrupoDataItem.EventKey = !'Totalizar' &acoesEmGrupoDataItem.IsDivider = False &acoesEmGrupoData.Add(&acoesEmGrupoDataItem) If (&LiberaCreditoPedido = 'S' or &LiberaCreditoPedido = 'X') &acoesEmGrupoDataItem = new() &acoesEmGrupoDataItem.Title = 'Liberar Crédito em Grupo' &acoesEmGrupoDataItem.EventKey = !'GerLiberarCredito' &acoesEmGrupoDataItem.IsDivider = False &acoesEmGrupoData.Add(&acoesEmGrupoDataItem) Endif &acoesEmGrupoDataItem = new() &acoesEmGrupoDataItem.Title = 'Fechar Financeiro em Grupo' &acoesEmGrupoDataItem.EventKey = !'FecharFin' &acoesEmGrupoDataItem.IsDivider = False &acoesEmGrupoData.Add(&acoesEmGrupoDataItem) &acoesEmGrupoDataItem = new() &acoesEmGrupoDataItem.Title = 'Imprimir em Grupo' &acoesEmGrupoDataItem.EventKey = !'ImprimirSelecionadas' &acoesEmGrupoDataItem.IsDivider = False &acoesEmGrupoData.Add(&acoesEmGrupoDataItem) &acoesEmGrupoDataItem = new() &acoesEmGrupoDataItem.Title = 'Faltas dos Pedidos' &acoesEmGrupoDataItem.EventKey = !'FaltasPedidos' &acoesEmGrupoDataItem.IsDivider = False &acoesEmGrupoData.Add(&acoesEmGrupoDataItem) &acoesEmGrupoDataItem = new() &acoesEmGrupoDataItem.Title = 'Exportar Exell' &acoesEmGrupoDataItem.Icon = ActionExport.Link() &acoesEmGrupoDataItem.EventKey = !'Export' &acoesEmGrupoDataItem.IsDivider = False &acoesEmGrupoData.Add(&acoesEmGrupoDataItem) &acoesEmGrupoDataItem = new() &acoesEmGrupoDataItem.Title = 'Exportar PDF' &acoesEmGrupoDataItem.Icon = ActionExportReport.Link() &acoesEmGrupoDataItem.EventKey = !'ExportReport' &acoesEmGrupoDataItem.IsDivider = False &acoesEmGrupoData.Add(&acoesEmGrupoDataItem) If (&SalvarFiltro = false) &acoesEmGrupoDataItem = new() &acoesEmGrupoDataItem.Title = 'Salvar Filtros' &acoesEmGrupoDataItem.Icon = ActionManageFilters.Link() &acoesEmGrupoDataItem.EventKey = !'SalvaFiltros' &acoesEmGrupoDataItem.IsDivider = False &acoesEmGrupoData.Add(&acoesEmGrupoDataItem) Endif If (&SalvarFiltro = true) &acoesEmGrupoDataItem = new() &acoesEmGrupoDataItem.Title = 'Não Salvar Filtros' &acoesEmGrupoDataItem.Icon = ActionCleanFilters.Link() &acoesEmGrupoDataItem.EventKey = !'NaoSalvar' &acoesEmGrupoDataItem.IsDivider = False &acoesEmGrupoData.Add(&acoesEmGrupoDataItem) Endif &PedSts = nullvalue(&PedSts) &PedStsFin = nullvalue(&PedStsFin) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = ' Lançamento Pedidos' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' &OrderedBy.Clear() &OrderedBy.AddItem(1, 'Pedido Decresc.') &OrderedBy.AddItem(2, 'Pedido Cresc.') &OrderedBy.AddItem(3, 'Previsão Decresc.') &OrderedBy.AddItem(4, 'Previsão Cresc.') &OrderedBy.AddItem(5, 'Nome Cliente') &OrderedBy.AddItem(6, 'Emissão') &OrderedBy.AddItem(7, 'Vencimento') &OrderedBy.AddItem(8, 'Faturado') If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &OrderedDsc.Visible = False &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() DDO_GridColumnsSelector.TitleControlIdToReplace = BtnEditColumns.InternalName GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &FilCod = &Context.FilCod &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Do 'GetComboSts' If &PedDtaEms_To.IsEmpty() and &PedDtaEms.IsEmpty() &PedDtaEms_To = serverdate() &PedDtaEms = &PedDtaEms_To - 30 &PedSts = Status_Pedido.ABERTO EndIF EndEvent Event Refresh &PedidosSelecionados = 'SEL_WWPEDIDOVENDAAGR' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' If &Session.Get(!'wwPedidoVendaAgrColumnsSelector') <> '' &ColumnsSelectorXML = &Session.Get(!'wwPedidoVendaAgrColumnsSelector') &ColumnsSelector.FromXml(&ColumnsSelectorXML) Else Do 'InitializeColumnsSelector' EndIf &IsMarcado.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(1).IsVisible &PedCodWithTags.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(2).IsVisible &PedNovCliRaz.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(3).IsVisible PedDtaEms.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(4).IsVisible PedDtaVct.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(5).IsVisible &NovoStatus.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(6).IsVisible PedDtaFat.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(7).IsVisible &AuxEst.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(8).IsVisible &AuxFin.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(9).IsVisible PedVlrLiq.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(10).IsVisible LctCod.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(11).IsVisible PedVenCod.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(12).IsVisible PedNroNfeAut.Visible = &ColumnsSelector.Columns.Item(13).IsVisible &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount PedDtaVct.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &FilCod = &Context.FilCod &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod RetornaEmpresaModulo.Call(&Context.EmpCod, ModuloSistema.AGRO_INSUMOS, &PossuiModuloAGRO_INSUMOS) RetornaConfSistema.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon010_LiberarCreditoPedido, &LiberaCreditoPedido) RetornaConfSistema.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon009_FecharComEstoque, &FechaPedidoSomenteComEstoque) RetornaConfSistema.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon058_DigitandoPedido, &TCon058_DigitandoPedido) RetornaConfSistema.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, domConfSistema.TCon059_StatusANALISADO, &TCon059_StatusANALISADO) tbStsCrd.Visible = (&LiberaCreditoPedido = 'S' or &LiberaCreditoPedido = 'X') RetornaAutorizacao.Call('WWPEDIDOVENDAAGR', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) do 'loadSelecionados' EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load &IsPagto = RetornaUmItemPago.udp(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod)//usa no cancelar item &IsUmReferenciado = RetornaUmPedidoReferencia.Udp(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &Alterar = !'' &comboAcoes.Clear() &comboAcoes.AddItem(0, 'WWP_ActionGroupCaption') If (&LiberaCreditoPedido = 'S' or &LiberaCreditoPedido = 'X') &comboAcoes.AddItem(1, 'Liberar Crédito') Endif If ((PedSts = Status_Pedido.ABERTO) and (LctAtuEst = Status_EntradaSaida.Saida) and &IsUmReferenciado <> true) &comboAcoes.AddItem(2, 'Liberar Estoque') Endif &comboAcoes.AddItem(3, 'Alterar Status') If (&PossuiModuloAGRO_INSUMOS = 'S' and PedStsFin = Status_financeiro.ABERTO and PedSts = Status_Pedido.ABERTO and &IsUmReferenciado <> true and PedStsGer <> Pedido_Gerado.OrdemCarregamento) &comboAcoes.AddItem(4, 'Entrega Futura!') Endif If (&PossuiModuloAGRO_INSUMOS = 'S' and PedSts = Status_Pedido.ABERTO and (&IsUmReferenciado = true or &IsPagto = true ) and PedStsGer <> Pedido_Gerado.OrdemCarregamento ) &comboAcoes.AddItem(5, 'Cancelar Item') Endif If (&PossuiModuloAGRO_INSUMOS = 'S' and PedSts = Status_Pedido.ABERTO and PedStsGer <> Pedido_Gerado.OrdemCarregamento) &comboAcoes.AddItem(6, 'Entregar/Faturar') Endif If ((PedSts in (Status_Pedido.ABERTO, Status_Pedido.SEPARANDO)) and (LctAtuSal <> Status_EntradaSaida.Nenhum) and &IsUmReferenciado <> true) &comboAcoes.AddItem(7, 'Emitir Nota') Endif If (PedSts <> Status_Pedido.ABERTO) &comboAcoes.AddItem(8, 'Abrir Estoque') Endif If (not PedSts in (Status_Pedido.FECHADO, Status_Pedido.CANCELADO) and &IsUmReferenciado <> true) &comboAcoes.AddItem(9, 'Fechar Estoque') Endif If (PedStsFin = Status_Financeiro.ABERTO and &IsUmReferenciado <> true) &comboAcoes.AddItem(10, 'Fechar Financeiro') Endif If (PedStsFin = Status_Financeiro.FECHADO and &IsUmReferenciado <> true) &comboAcoes.AddItem(11, 'Alterar Financeiro') Endif &comboAcoes.AddItem(12, 'Comissão Extra') &comboAcoes.AddItem(13, 'Ref./Ane./Cot.') &comboAcoes.AddItem(14, 'Críticas Pedido') If (PedSts <> 'F' and &IsUmReferenciado <> true) &comboAcoes.AddItem(15, 'Cancelar Pedido') Endif If (PedStsGer <> Pedido_Gerado.OrdemCarregamento) &comboAcoes.AddItem(16, 'Copiar Pedido') Endif &comboAcoes.AddItem(17, 'Histórico Cliente') &EnviarEmail = !'' &ImprimirPedido = !'' &PedNovCliRaz = iif(PedCliCodRaz_Nov.Length() > 30, Substr(PedCliCodRaz_Nov,1,30)+'...', PedCliCodRaz_Nov) &NovoStatus = trim(PedNovStsNom) &AuxEst = UPPER(Substr(PedSts.EnumerationDescription(), 1,3)) If PedStsFinIsPar = true &AuxFin = 'PAR.' Else &AuxFin = UPPER(Substr(PedStsFin.EnumerationDescription(), 1,3)) Endif PedDtaVct.ColumnClass = iif(PedDtaVct < Serverdate(), !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell', !'WWColumn') &PedCodWithTags.HorizontalAlignment = !'Right' &PedCodWithTags = trim(PedCod.ToFormattedString()) If PedStsGer = Pedido_Gerado.OrdemCarregamento &PedCodWithTags += format(!"", "Ordem Carregamento") EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Do Case Case PedStsFin = Status_Financeiro.CANCELADO &AuxFin.ForeColor = RGB(255, 132, 0) Case PedStsFin = Status_Financeiro.ABERTO if PedStsFinIsPar = true &AuxFin.ForeColor = RGB(205, 100, 0) Else &AuxFin.ForeColor = RGB(0, 100, 200) Endif Otherwise &AuxFin.ForeColor = RGB(0, 0, 0) EndCase If PedNroNfeAut > 0 PedNroNfeAut.Link = VerNota.link(EmpCod,FilCod,PedCod) else PedNroNfeAut.Link = '' EndIf &PedNovCliRaz.Link = VerPedido.Link('WWPEDIDOVENDAAGR', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) RetornaIsPodeAlterar.Call('', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, &IsAutorizado) if PedStsGer = Pedido_Gerado.OrdemCarregamento &Alterar.Link = wpOrdemCarregamentos.Link('WWPEDIDOVENDAAGR', Trnmode.Update, EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) If &IsAutorizado = false or PedSts <> Status_Pedido.ABERTO &Alterar = !'' &Alterar.TooltipText = "Visualizar Pedido" &Alterar.Link = VerPedido.Link('WWPEDIDOVENDAAGR', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) Endif Else &Alterar.Link = PedidoVendas.link(TrnMode.Update,EmpCod,FilCod,PedCod,&DeOndeVem) If &IsAutorizado = false &Alterar = !'' &Alterar.TooltipText = "Visualizar Pedido" &Alterar.Link = VerPedido.Link('WWPEDIDOVENDAAGR', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) Endif Endif If LctTip = TipoLancamento.OrcamentoVenda PedCod.ForeColor = RGB(255,0,0) Else PedCod.ForeColor = RGB(0,0,0) EndIF //prcStatusPedidoRGB_Nome.Call(EmpCod, PedNovStsFinCod, &NovoStatusFinanceiro, &R, &G, &B ) //&NovoStatusFinanceiro.ForeColor = RGB(&R, &G, &B) prcStatusPedidoRGB_Nome.Call(EmpCod, PedNovStsCod, &NovoStatus, &R, &G, &B ) &NovoStatus.ForeColor = RGB(&R, &G, &B) &AuxPedCod = PedCod &IsMarcado = false do 'IsSelecionado' EndEvent Event &OrderedBy.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_GridColumnsSelector.OnColumnsChanged if 1=2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ColumnsSelectorXML = DDO_GridColumnsSelector.ColumnsSelectorValues &ColumnsSelector.FromJson(&ColumnsSelectorXML) SaveColumnsSelectorState(!'wwPedidoVendaAgrColumnsSelector', &ColumnsSelector.ToXml()) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Else &ColumnsSelectorXML = DDO_GridColumnsSelector.ColumnsSelectorValues &ColumnsSelector.FromJson(&ColumnsSelectorXML) SaveColumnsSelectorState.Call(!'WWPedidoVendaColumnsSelector', &ColumnsSelector.ToXml()) Refresh EndIf EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &comboAcoes.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &comboAcoes = 1 Do 'Do LiberarCredito' Case &comboAcoes = 2 Do 'Do LiberaConformeEstoque' Case &comboAcoes = 3 Do 'Do AlterarStatus' Case &comboAcoes = 4 Do 'Do EntregaFutura' Case &comboAcoes = 5 Do 'Do CancelarItem' Case &comboAcoes = 6 Do 'Do OrdemCarregamento' Case &comboAcoes = 7 Do 'Do EmitirNFe' Case &comboAcoes = 8 Do 'Do AbrirEstoquePedido' Case &comboAcoes = 9 Do 'Do FecharEstoquePedido' Case &comboAcoes = 10 Do 'Do FecharFinanceiroPedido' Case &comboAcoes = 11 Do 'Do AlterarFinanceiro' Case &comboAcoes = 12 Do 'Do ComissaoExtra' Case &comboAcoes = 13 Do 'Do RefAnexos' Case &comboAcoes = 14 Do 'Do Criticaspedido' Case &comboAcoes = 15 Do 'Do CancelarPedido' Case &comboAcoes = 16 Do 'Do CopiarPedido' Case &comboAcoes = 17 Do 'Do HistoricoCliente' EndCase &comboAcoes = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event AbrirEstoquePedido_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wpAbrirPedidoVenda.Create(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event AbrirEstoquePedido_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Criticaspedido_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = WcCriticasDoPedido.Create(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'Dosdd' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wpLocalizaNotaPedido.PopUp(&EmpCod, &FilPedcod) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DousrInserir' PedidoVendas.Call(TrnMode.Insert,&Context.EmpCod,&FilCod,0,&DeOndeVem) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoMarcarTodos' For Each Line &IsMarcado = true &IsAchou = false For &SdtPedidosItem in &SdtPedidos if &sdtPedidosItem.PedCod = PedCod &IsAchou = true Exit EndIF EndFor if &IsAchou = false &SdtPedidosItem = New() &sdtPedidosItem.EmPCod = EmpCod &sdtPedidosItem.FiLCod = FilCod &sdtPedidosItem.PedCod = PedCod &SdtPedidos.Add(&sdtPedidosItem) EndIF EndFor do 'txtMarcados' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event ddo_acoesEmGrupo.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case ddo_acoesEmGrupo.ActiveEventKey = !'Totalizar' Do 'Do Totalizar' Case ddo_acoesEmGrupo.ActiveEventKey = !'GerLiberarCredito' Do 'Do GerLiberarCredito' Case ddo_acoesEmGrupo.ActiveEventKey = !'FecharFin' Do 'Do FecharFin' Case ddo_acoesEmGrupo.ActiveEventKey = !'ImprimirSelecionadas' Do 'Do ImprimirSelecionadas' Case ddo_acoesEmGrupo.ActiveEventKey = !'FaltasPedidos' Do 'Do FaltasPedidos' Case ddo_acoesEmGrupo.ActiveEventKey = !'Export' Do 'DoExport' Case ddo_acoesEmGrupo.ActiveEventKey = !'ExportReport' Do 'DoExportReport' Case ddo_acoesEmGrupo.ActiveEventKey = !'SalvaFiltros' Do 'Do SalvaFiltros' Case ddo_acoesEmGrupo.ActiveEventKey = !'NaoSalvar' Do 'Do NaoSalvar' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Totalizar_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wpTotalizaPedidos.Create(&FinMedioMoeda, &medioMoeda, &PedidoMoeda, &QtdPedidos, &FinQtdPedido, &FinPedidoMoeda) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'InitializeColumnsSelector' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ColumnsSelector = new WWPColumnsSelector() WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&IsMarcado", '', !'#', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedCod", '', !'Pedido', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&PedNovCliRaz", '', !'Razão/Nome Cliente', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedDtaEms", '', !'Emissão', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedDtaVct", '', !'Vencimento', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&NovoStatus", '', !'Status', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedDtaFat", '', !'Faturado', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&AuxEst", '', !'Est.', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"&AuxFin", '', !'Fin.', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedVlrLiq", '', !'Líquido ', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"LctCod", '', !'Lcto', True, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedVenCod", '', !'Vend.', False, '') WWP_ColumnsSelector_Add(&ColumnsSelector, !"PedNroNfeAut", '', !'NF Nro', True, '') &UserCustomValue = LoadColumnsSelectorState.Udp(!'wwPedidoVendaAgrColumnsSelector') If not(&UserCustomValue.IsEmpty()) &ColumnsSelectorAux.FromXml(&UserCustomValue) WWP_ColumnSelector_UpdateColumns(&ColumnsSelectorAux, &ColumnsSelector) EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &LctCod1.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaFat1.Visible = False &PedVenCod1.Visible = False &PedNum1.Visible = False &PedCliCidNom1.Visible = False &PedCliRatCod1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDDTAFAT' TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaFat1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDVENCOD' &PedVenCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDNUM' &PedNum1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDCLICIDNOM' &PedCliCidNom1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDCLIRATCOD' &PedCliRatCod1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &LctCod2.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaFat2.Visible = False &PedVenCod2.Visible = False &PedNum2.Visible = False &PedCliCidNom2.Visible = False &PedCliRatCod2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDDTAFAT' TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaFat2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDVENCOD' &PedVenCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDNUM' &PedNum2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDCLICIDNOM' &PedCliCidNom2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDCLIRATCOD' &PedCliRatCod2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &LctCod3.Visible = False TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaFat3.Visible = False &PedVenCod3.Visible = False &PedNum3.Visible = False &PedCliCidNom3.Visible = False &PedCliRatCod3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDDTAFAT' TableMergedDynamicFiltersPedDtaFat3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDVENCOD' &PedVenCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDNUM' &PedNum3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDCLICIDNOM' &PedCliCidNom3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDCLIRATCOD' &PedCliRatCod3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do LiberarCredito' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do LiberaConformeEstoque' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do AlterarStatus' wpHistoricoStatus.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do EntregaFutura' WpEntregaFutura.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do CancelarItem' &PedQtd = RetornaQuantidadePedidoOrdem.udp(EmpCod,FilCod,PedCod) &PedQtdDsp = &PedQtd - RetornaQtdRetirada.Udp(EmpCod,FilCod,0,PedCod) If &PedQtdDsp > 0 //quantidade disponível /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wpCancelarItemEntregaFutura.PopUp(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Else msg('ATENÇÃO! Quantidade do pedido '+str(&PedQtd)+'. Disponível '+str(&PedQtdDsp)+'. Não existe quantidade disponível para cancelar neste pedido.') EndIf EndSub Sub 'Do OrdemCarregamento' //Fazer somente gerar &PedQtdDsp= 0 &PedQtd = 0 &IsAchouPedido = false ValidaPedidoOrdem.Call(EmpCod,FilCod,PedCod, &OrdeCarrePedCod) //verifica ordem de carregamento aberta If &OrdeCarrePedCod > 0 wpOrdemCarregamentos.Link('WWPEDIDOVENDAAGR', TrnMode.Update, EmpCod, FilCod, &OrdeCarrePedCod) Else &PedQtd = RetornaQuantidadePedidoOrdem.udp(EmpCod,FilCod,PedCod) &PedQtdDsp = &PedQtd - RetornaQtdRetirada.Udp(EmpCod,FilCod,0,PedCod) If &PedQtdDsp > 0 //quantidade disponível wpOrdemCarregamentos.Link('WWPEDIDOVENDAAGR', TrnMode.Insert, EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) Else msg('ATENÇÃO! Quantidade do pedido '+str(&PedQtd)+'. Disponível '+str(&PedQtdDsp)+'. Não existe quantidade disponível neste pedido.') EndIf Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do EmitirNFe' &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('VENDAFECHAESTOQUE', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) If &AutNiv > 0 &IsSemEstoque = false If &FechaPedidoSomenteComEstoque = 'S' //FECHA PEDIDO SOMENTE COM ESTOQUE &IsSemEstoque = VerificaProdutoSemEstoque.Udp(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) EndIf if &LiberaCreditoPedido = 'S' or &LiberaCreditoPedido = 'X' &IsPodeFaturar = RetornaIsPodeFaturar.Udp(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) EndIF VerificaLoteInformadoPedidoCompra.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, &IsTodosInformados, &mensagem) Do Case Case &IsTodosInformados <> true wpinformalotesfaltantespedidoVenda.Link('WWPEDIDOVENDAAGR', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) Case &FechaPedidoSomenteComEstoque = 'S' and &IsSemEstoque = true msg('No pedido existe produtos que não possuem estoque suficiente! [CONF58]') Case (&LiberaCreditoPedido = 'S' or &LiberaCreditoPedido = 'X') and &IsPodeFaturar = false msg('Pedido não liberado para Faturamento! Falta Liberação do Crédito! [CONF23]') Case LctAtuSal = Status_EntradaSaida.Nenhum msg('Pedido em Operação que não atualiza saldos, não permitido para fazer nota!') Case (PedSts <> Status_Pedido.ABERTO) And (PedSts <> Status_Pedido.SEPARANDO) msg('Somente pedidos com o status estoque "ABERTO" ou "SEPARANDO" pode fazer nota!') Otherwise GravaNotaTemporariaVenda.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, '55') wpSelecionaProdutosNFe.Link('WWPEDIDOVENDAAGR', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) EndCase Else msg('Não Autorizado ao Nível de Fechar Estoque Pedido Venda. [VENDAFECHAESTOQUE]') EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do AbrirEstoquePedido' If PedSts <> Status_Pedido.ABERTO &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('VENDAABREESTOQUE', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) If &AutNiv > 0 //wpAbrirPedidoVenda.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AbrirEstoquePedido_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Else msg('Não Autorizado ao Nível de Abrir Estoque Pedido Venda. [VENDAABREESTOQUE]') EndIF Else msg('Opção Disponível somente pedido diferentes de Abertos!') EndiF EndSub Sub 'Do FecharEstoquePedido' &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('VENDAFECHAESTOQUE', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) If &AutNiv > 0 if not PedSts in (Status_Pedido.FECHADO, Status_Pedido.CANCELADO) &IsClienteComCredito = true do 'VerificaCreditoCliente' IF (LctAtuEst <> Status_EntradaSaida.Nenhum) or LctGerFin = Status_SimNao.Sim &IsSemEstoque = false If &FechaPedidoSomenteComEstoque = 'S' //FECHA PEDIDO SOMENTE COM ESTOQUE &IsSemEstoque = VerificaProdutoSemEstoque.Udp(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) EndIf if &LiberaCreditoPedido = 'S' or &LiberaCreditoPedido = 'X' &IsPodeFaturar = RetornaIsPodeFaturar.Udp(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) EndIF VerificaLoteInformadoPedidoCompra.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, &IsTodosInformados, &Mensagem) &IsPodeFaturarOrdemCarregamento = true If PedStsGer = Pedido_gerado.OrdemCarregamento ValidaItemSelecionaOrdemCarregamento.call(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, &IsPodeFaturarOrdemCarregamento) endif Do Case Case &IsPodeFaturarOrdemCarregamento = false msg('Ordem de Carregamento com Quantidades Superiores ao Pedido Origem, ou pedido de origem cancelado ou faturado.') Case &IsTodosInformados <> true wpinformalotesfaltantespedidoVenda.Link('WWPEDIDOVENDAAGR', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) Case &FechaPedidoSomenteComEstoque = 'S' and &IsSemEstoque = true msg('No pedido existe produtos que não possuem estoque suficiente! [CONF58]') Case (&LiberaCreditoPedido = 'S' or &LiberaCreditoPedido = 'X') and &IsPodeFaturar = false msg('Pedido não liberado para Faturamento! Falta Liberação do Crédito! [CONF23]') Case &IsClienteComCredito = false msg('Crédito do cliente atingido, Solicite liberação de limite crédito para o pedido!') Otherwise wpFecharPedidoVendaIntegrado.Link('WWPEDIDOVENDAAGR', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) EndCase Else wpFecharPedidoVenda.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) Refresh EndIf Else msg('Pedido já Fechado ou Cancelado!') EndIF Else msg('Não Autorizado ao Nível de Fechar Estoque Pedido Venda. [VENDAFECHAESTOQUE]') EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do FecharFinanceiroPedido' &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('VENDAFECHAFINANCEIRO', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) If &AutNiv > 0 // FechaFinanceiroPedidoVenda.Call('WWPEDIDOVENDAAGR', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, false) // wwpdividirconta.Call('WWPEDIDOVENDAAGR', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) wpPedido_FechaFinanceiroAgr.Call('WWPEDIDOVENDAAGR', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, 0, false) Else msg('Não Autorizado ao Nível de Fechar Financeiro Pedido Venda. [VENDAFECHAFINANCEIRO]') EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do AlterarFinanceiro' &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('VENDAFECHAFINANCEIRO', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) If &AutNiv > 0 FechaFinanceiroPedidoVenda.Call('WWPEDIDOVENDAAGR', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, false) Else msg('Não Autorizado ao Nível de Fechar Financeiro Pedido Venda. [VENDAFECHAFINANCEIRO]') EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ComissaoExtra' PedidoComissao.Link(TrnMode.Update, EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do RefAnexos' wpReferenciasComerciais.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCliCod, PedCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Criticaspedido' // wpCriticasPedido.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Criticaspedido_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do CancelarPedido' If PedSts <> Status_Pedido.ABERTO msg('Somente Pedidos Abertos podem ser Cancelados!') Else &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('VENDACANCELARPEDIDO', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) RetornaIsPodeAlterar.Call('', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, &IsAutorizado) If &AutNiv > 0 if &IsAutorizado = true wpCancelarPedidoVenda.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) Refresh Else msg('Você não tem acesso para alterar Excluir Pedido nesse Status!') EndIF else msg('Usuário Não Autorizado a Rotina de Cancelar Pedido de Venda. [VENDACANCELARPEDIDO]') endif EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do CopiarPedido' WpCopiarPedidoVenda.Link('WWPEDIDOVENDAAGR', EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do HistoricoCliente' wwhistoricoCliente.Link(PedCliCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Totalizar' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Totalizar_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do GerLiberarCredito' // &SdtPedido.Clear() // &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('LIBERACREDITOPEDIDO', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) // Do Case // Case &LiberaCreditoPedido <> 'S' and &LiberaCreditoPedido <> 'X' //LIBERACAO CREDITO PEDIDO // msg('Opção Liberação de Crédito Pedido, não Habilitada para esta Empresa. [TCon010]') // // Case &AutNiv < 1 // msg('Usuário Não Autorizado a Rotina de Liberar Crédito Pedido Venda. [LIBERACREDITOPEDIDO]') // // Otherwise // Do 'SelecionadosLiberacao' // If &SdtPedido.Count > 0 // &websession.Set('LIBERACAOMULTIPLO',&SdtPedido.ToXml()) // wpLiberarCreditoPedidos.Link() // Else // msg('Nenhum Pedido selecionado para liberação!') // EndIF // EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do FecharFin' // &SdtPedido.Clear() // Do 'Selecionados' // &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('VENDAFECHAFINANCEIRO', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) // If &AutNiv > 0 // // Do Case // Case &IsErroPedCliCod = true // msg('Não Permitido fechamento Multiplo com Clientes Diferentes') // Case &IsErroLctCod = true // msg('Não Permitido fechamento Multiplo com Tipo Lançamentos Diferentes') // Otherwise // If &SdtPedido.Count > 1 // &websession.Set('FECHAMENTOMULTIPLO',&SdtPedido.ToXml()) // WpFechaFinanceiroVendaMultiplos.Call('WWPEDIDOVENDAAGR',&PedCliCod,PedCliCodRaz) // Else // msg('Existe Menos de 2 pedidos selecionados Verifique! Com 1 pedido favor realizar fechamento normal.') // Endif // EndCAse // Else // msg('Não Autorizado ao Nível de Fechar Financeiro Pedido Venda. [VENDAFECHAFINANCEIRO]') // EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ImprimirSelecionadas' if &SdtPedidos.Count > 0 &WebSession.Set('VARIOSPEDIDOSVENDA', &SdtPedidos.ToJson()) wpImprimirPedidoVenda.Popup(&EmpCod, &FilCod, 0) Else msg('Nenhum pedido para ser impresso!') EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do FaltasPedidos' wpFaltasVariosPedidos.Link('WWPEDIDOVENDAAGR', &PedidosSelecionados) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do SalvaFiltros' saveColumnsSelectorState.Call('FLT#WWPedidoVendaColumnsSelector', '1') WWPedidoVendaAgr.Link() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do NaoSalvar' saveColumnsSelectorState.Call('FLT#WWPedidoVendaColumnsSelector', '2') WWPedidoVendaAgr.Link() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FILCOD" &FilCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDFATFILCOD" &PedFatFilCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FILPEDCOD" &FilPedCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDSTS" &PedSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDNOVSTSCOD" &PedNovStsCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDCLICOD" &PedCliCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDCLIRAZ" &PedCliRaz.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDSTSFIN" &PedStsFin.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDNOVSTSFINCOD" &PedNovStsFinCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDDTAEMS" &PedDtaEms.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &PedDtaEms_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"LCTTIP" &LctTip.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"LCTATUSAL" &LctAtuSal.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PEDBLQ" &PedBlq.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTCOD' &LctCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDDTAFAT' &PedDtaFat1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) &PedDtaFat_To1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDVENCOD' &PedVenCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDNUM' &PedNum1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDCLICIDNOM' &PedCliCidNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDCLIRATCOD' &PedCliRatCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FILCOD", "", not &FilCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &FilCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDFATFILCOD", "", not &PedFatFilCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedFatFilCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FILPEDCOD", "", not &FilPedCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &FilPedCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDSTS", "", not &PedSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedSts, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDNOVSTSCOD", "", not &PedNovStsCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedNovStsCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDCLICOD", "", not &PedCliCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedCliCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDCLIRAZ", "", not &PedCliRaz.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedCliRaz, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDSTSFIN", "", not &PedStsFin.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedStsFin, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDNOVSTSFINCOD", "", not &PedNovStsFinCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedNovStsFinCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDDTAEMS", "", not (&PedDtaEms.IsEmpty() AND &PedDtaEms_To.IsEmpty()), 0, &PedDtaEms.ToString().Trim(), &PedDtaEms_To.ToString().Trim()) WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"LCTTIP", "", not &LctTip.IsEmpty(), 0, &LctTip, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"LCTATUSAL", "", not &LctAtuSal.IsEmpty(), 0, &LctAtuSal, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PEDBLQ", "", not &PedBlq.IsEmpty(), 0, &PedBlq, '') Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'LCTCOD' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDDTAFAT' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedDtaFat1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &PedDtaFat_To1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDVENCOD' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedVenCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDNUM' AND not &PedNum1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedNum1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDCLICIDNOM' AND not &PedCliCidNom1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedCliCidNom1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PEDCLIRATCOD' AND not &PedCliRatCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedCliRatCod1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'LCTCOD' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDDTAFAT' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedDtaFat2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &PedDtaFat_To2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDVENCOD' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedVenCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDNUM' AND not &PedNum2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedNum2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDCLICIDNOM' AND not &PedCliCidNom2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedCliCidNom2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PEDCLIRATCOD' AND not &PedCliRatCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedCliRatCod2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'LCTCOD' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &LctCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDDTAFAT' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedDtaFat3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &PedDtaFat_To3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDVENCOD' &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedVenCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDNUM' AND not &PedNum3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedNum3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDCLICIDNOM' AND not &PedCliCidNom3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedCliCidNom3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PEDCLIRATCOD' AND not &PedCliRatCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &PedCliRatCod3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"Pedido" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'DoExport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate Excel spreadsheet and download it. Do 'LoadGridState' ExportwwPedidoVendaAgr.Call(&ExcelFilename, &ErrorMessage) If (&ExcelFilename <> "") Link(&ExcelFilename) Else msg(&ErrorMessage) Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'DoExportReport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate PDF file. Do 'LoadGridState' InNewWindow1.Target = ExportReportwwPedidoVendaAgr.Link() InNewWindow1.Height = !'600' InNewWindow1.Width = !'800' InNewWindow1.OpenWindow() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event 'DoTotalizar' RetornaTotalPedidosVendaGrid.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &FilPedCod, &PedSts, &PedStsFin, &PedCliCod, &PedStsCrd, &PedDtaEms, &PedDtaEms_To, &PedDtaFat1, &PedDtaFat_To1, &LctCod1, &PedVenCod1, 'V', &FinMedioMoeda,&medioMoeda,&PedidoMoeda,&QtdPedidos,&FinQtdPedido,&FinPedidoMoeda) //wpTotalizaPedidos.Popup(&FinMedioMoeda,&medioMoeda,&PedidoMoeda,&QtdPedidos,&FinQtdPedido,&FinPedidoMoeda) EndEvent Event &PedSts.IsValid Do 'GetComboSts' EndEvent Event &ImprimirPedido.Click wpImprimirPedidoVenda.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) EndEvent Event &EnviarEmail.Click wpEnviaPedido.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod) EndEvent Event limpar_campo.Click &SdtPedidos.Clear() do 'txtMarcados' Refresh EndEvent Event PedidosSelecionados.Click wpPedidoSelecionado.Popup(&PedidosSelecionados) Refresh EndEvent Event &IsMarcado.Click &IsAchou = false If &IsMarcado = true //TRUE For &SdtPedidosItem in &SdtPedidos if &sdtPedidosItem.PedCod = PedCod &IsAchou = true Exit EndIF EndFor if &IsAchou = false &SdtPedidosItem = New() &sdtPedidosItem.EmPCod = EmpCod &sdtPedidosItem.FiLCod = FilCod &sdtPedidosItem.PedCod = PedCod &SdtPedidos.Add(&sdtPedidosItem) EndIF Else //FALSE For &SdtPedidosItem in &SdtPedidos if &sdtPedidosItem.PedCod = PedCod &Index = &sdtPedidos.IndexOf(&sdtPedidosItem) &sdtPedidos.Remove(&Index) Exit EndIF EndFor EndIf do 'txtMarcados' EndEvent Sub 'GetComboSts' &SdtStatusPedido.Clear() &SdtStatusPedido = DpStatusPedido.udp(&EmpCod, &PedSts, 'P') &PedNovStsCod.Clear() &PedNovStsCod.AddItem(0,'TODOS STATUS') For &SdtStatusPedidoItm in &SdtStatusPedido &PedNovStsCod.AddItem(&SdtStatusPedidoItm.StsCod,&SdtStatusPedidoItm.StsNom) EndFor &SdtStatusPedido.Clear() &SdtStatusPedido = DpStatusPedido.udp(&EmpCod, &PedSts, 'C') &PedNovStsFinCod.Clear() &PedNovStsFinCod.AddItem(0,'TODOS STATUS') For &SdtStatusPedidoItm in &SdtStatusPedido &PedNovStsFinCod.AddItem(&SdtStatusPedidoItm.StsCod,&SdtStatusPedidoItm.StsNom) EndFor EndSub Sub 'VerificaCreditoCliente' // If LctTip = TipoLancamento.SaidaMercadoria //Controla Credito do Cliente // &DebitoMoeda = RetornaCreditoDisponivelCliente.UDP(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCliCod) // // If (&DebitoMoeda + PedVlrLiq) > PedCliCrd // &ValorLiberadoMoeda = RetornaValorAutorizadoPedido.Udp(EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, PedCliCod) // // If &ValorLiberadoMoeda < PedVlrLiq // &IsClienteComCredito = false // EndIF // EndIF // EndIf EndSub Sub 'txtMarcados' &numeric = &SdtPedidos.Count PedidosSelecionados.Caption = trim(str(&numeric)) + ' - Pedidos Marcados' padraoUsuario.Call('G', &PedidosSelecionados, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &SdtPedidos.ToJson(), &PadDtaMod) EndSub Sub 'loadSelecionados' padraoUsuario.Call('L', &PedidosSelecionados, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) &SdtPedidos.FromJson(&PadObs) do 'txtMarcados' EndSub Sub 'IsSelecionado' For &SdtPedidosItem in &SdtPedidos If &sdtPedidosItem.PedCod = &AuxPedCod &IsMarcado = true EndIf EndFor EndSub Sub 'montaFilialFaturamento' &PedFatFilCod.Clear() &PedFatFilCod.AddItem(0, '0 - TODAS FILIAIS') tbFilialFaturamento.Visible = 0 For &Filials in &Context.Filials &PedFatFilCod.AddItem(&Filials.FilCodVin, gxGetMLi(&Filials.FilRazVin, 1, 25)) EndFor if &Context.Filials.Count > 1 tbFilialFaturamento.Visible = 1 Endif EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
